allow:
Bash(wsl.exe -d Arch -- bash << 'OUTER'
cd /mnt/c/Users/wilde/Downloads/arch-linux-with-full-ai-control
ISO=$\(ls -t output/*.iso 2>/dev/null | head -1\)

# Kill any leftover QEMU
pkill -f qemu-system 2>/dev/null; sleep 1

# Boot with proper display adapter and more RAM
qemu-system-x86_64 \\
    -m 4G -smp 2 \\
    -cdrom "$ISO" -boot d \\
    -enable-kvm \\
    -vga virtio \\
    -display none \\
    -net nic,model=virtio -net user,hostfwd=tcp::2224-:22 \\
    -daemonize

echo "QEMU started with virtio-vga, waiting for SSH..."

for i in $\(seq 1 120\); do
    sleep 2
    if ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=2 -p 2224 root@127.0.0.1 echo "OK" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "=== SSH UP after $\(\(i*2\)\)s ==="

        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2224 root@127.0.0.1 << 'DIAG'
echo "=== FAILED SERVICES ==="
systemctl --failed --no-pager
echo ""
echo "=== LIGHTDM ==="
systemctl status lightdm --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo ""
echo "=== AI CONTROL ==="
systemctl status ai-control --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== PLYMOUTH ==="
systemctl status plymouth-quit-wait --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== DEFAULT TARGET ==="
systemctl get-default
echo ""
echo "=== XORG ERRORS ==="
grep -i "error\\|fatal\\|failed" /var/log/Xorg.0.log 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "No Xorg log"
echo ""
echo "=== RUNNING ==="
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager --no-legend | head -15
DIAG

        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -p 2224 root@127.0.0.1 "poweroff" 2>/dev/null
        break
    fi
    echo -n "."
done
echo ""
echo "=== Done ==="
OUTER)
